overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a character riding a futuristic yellow-finned motorcycle along high-rise building edges and elevated highways. The clip showcases high-speed traversal through a sprawling sci-fi metropolis, transitioning between outdoor building edges, covered indoor corridors, and dramatic inter-building jumps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated building edge pathway adjacent to water

agents.ego_description: character riding futuristic motorcycle along building edge at moderate speed, leaning into turns

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with mirrored glass facade reflecting sunlight
large body of water visible between buildings, extending to horizon
multi-lane elevated roadway running parallel to building edge
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers in the distance
hazy mountain range visible beyond the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a motorcyclist riding along a narrow building edge high above a waterfront. Modern glass towers rise on the right while an expansive bay stretches to the left. The elevated highway runs parallel below as the character navigates the concrete pathway with the city skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with speed boost effect

events.description: motorcycle activates high-speed boost creating heavy motion blur effect

agents.ego_description: character accelerating to high speed along elevated highway with motion blur visual effect

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates into a high-speed boost along the elevated highway, triggering a dramatic motion blur effect. The water bay and mountains disappear from view as the camera focuses forward, with glass buildings now flanking both sides of the roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: building edge pathway with industrial equipment

events.description: approaching and entering indoor building corridor section

agents.ego_description: character navigating narrow building edge pathway, slowing before entering covered structure

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
large industrial HVAC units and exhaust vents along building edge
narrow concrete walkway along building perimeter with safety railings

segments.scene_description: Speed returns to normal as the motorcycle navigates a narrower building edge pathway. Digital billboards and industrial ventilation equipment line the right side while the water bay reappears on the left. The character approaches a transition into an indoor corridor section.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed building corridor with industrial infrastructure

events.description: exiting indoor corridor back to outdoor building edge

agents.ego_description: character maneuvering through tight indoor corridors between buildings, navigating turns

entered.detail: covered walkway connecting buildings with overhead structural beams
transparent glass panels showing interior building structure
solid concrete structural walls with industrial finish
large spinning exhaust fans mounted on corridor walls
exposed utility piping and conduits running along walls

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters an enclosed corridor section between skyscrapers, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. The path narrows further with glass walls on one side and concrete on the other, lined with industrial ventilation fans and exposed piping. The character continues through the covered walkway before approaching the exit back to open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude building edge with city views

events.description: motorcycle performs jump across gap between buildings

agents.ego_description: character riding at high altitude along building edges, executing jumps between structures while overlooking city sprawl

entered.detail: bright illuminated advertisements with cyberpunk aesthetic and japanese text
aerial view of urban streets and traffic far below the elevated path
metal scaffolding structures on building facade indicating ongoing construction
narrow elevated walkway along skyscraper perimeter with safety barriers

segments.scene_description: Exiting the indoor corridor, the scene opens to a breathtaking high-altitude view of the sprawling cyberpunk city. The motorcycle navigates narrow building edges with neon billboards flashing on the right and streets visible far below. The character executes a dramatic jump across a building gap around the 48-second mark, continuing along the elevated pathway with construction scaffolding and distant mountains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a high-altitude waterfront edge and transitions through an enclosed industrial corridor before opening into a sprawling neon cityscape. It begins by following a motorcyclist along a narrow concrete pathway between glass towers and an expansive bay, before accelerating into a high-speed boost that blurs the surrounding mountains and water into a streak of motion. As the speed stabilizes, the camera tracks the rider past digital billboards and ventilation equipment toward a transition into a covered indoor section, where natural light shifts to artificial illumination amidst exposed piping and glass walls. The scene then expands as the motorcycle exits the corridor back into the open air, navigating narrow edges lined with flashing neon signs. Finally, the camera captures a dramatic jump across a gap between skyscrapers, revealing construction scaffolding and distant mountains against the vast urban horizon.
